title: Vice and Virtue
writer: Roger Vailland, Roger Vadim, Claude Choublier
actors: Annie Girardot, Robert Hossein, Catherine Deneuve
plot: Set against the backdrop of the Nazi occupation of France, VICE AND VIRTURE is a stylized retelling of the Marquis de Sade's Justine, as envisioned by one of cinema's most provocative filmmakers Roger Vadim.
